main.description: Assert a TRADE ITEM (product) into the kotoba Datom log (:product/*), keyed on the GS1 GTIN. Public-record data only — GTIN, brand, brand-owner (→ kabuto :company/id), GS1 prefix, GPC/UNSPSC/HS classification, net content (uchiwake G1). The GTIN is validated against the GS1 mod-10 check digit before admission (G5). NEVER a confidential recipe, non-public commercial term, or consumer PII.

gtin.description: GS1 GTIN; any of GTIN-8/12/13/14, validated by the mod-10 check digit, normalized to 14 digits on ingest

brandOwner.description: → kabuto :company/id (org.corp.*) of the brand-owning legal entity (may be a subsidiary; see registerOwnership)

gs1Prefix.description: GS1 company prefix (leading GTIN digits GS1 allocates to a licensee)

gs1PrefixCountry.description: ISO 3166-1 alpha-2 of the GS1 Member Organisation that issued the prefix — licensing country, NOT necessarily origin

gpcBrick.description: GS1 Global Product Classification brick code (8-digit)

netContentMilli.description: net content in THOUSANDTHS of the unit (magnitude × 1000, integer implied units)

sourcing.description: uchiwake G5; :authoritative only when the GTIN↔product binding is confirmed (GS1 GDSN / GS1 Verified)
